case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC VS. ERNEST CAMBELL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC AS TO DEFENDANT CAMBELL, ERNEST SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-09-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ERNEST CAMPBELL JR'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO CURRENT FEES OF $225 FOR THE ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: EBURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
